info.title: AI Force: GenAI Gateway & Guardrail Service(G3S)
info.description:
The AI Force: GenAI Gateway & Guardrail Service(G3S) API provides endpoints
        for managing configurations, handling chat completions, embeddings,
        and security-related operations. It supports functionalities such as saving,
        updating, deleting, and listing configurations for Large Language Models (LLMs),
        embeddings, speech models, and security settings.
        The API also includes endpoint for health checks,
        ensuring robust integration and monitoring capabilities.
        Authentication is enforced using HTTP Bearer tokens.

post.description:
Handle embedding requests.
Args:
    request (EmbeddingRequest): The embedding request.
    service (ChatModelService): The chat model service.

Handle LLM call requests.
Args:
    request (LLMCallRequest): The LLM call request.
    service (ChatModelService): The chat model service.

Save a new LLM configuration.

Args:
    request (LLMConfig): Configuration data to save.
    service (ConfigService): Service layer for handling logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: Success message and saved config data.

delete.description:
Delete an existing LLM (Large Language Model) configuration.

Args:
    config_id (int): The unique identifier of the LLM configuration to be deleted.
    service (ConfigService): Service layer for handling logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: Success message and deletion result.

put.description:
Update an existing LLM configuration.

Args:
    request (LLMConfig): Updated configuration data.
    config_id (int): ID of the config to update.
    service (ConfigService): Service layer for handling logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: Success message and updated config data.

get.description:
List all LLM configurations for a specific project.

Args:
    project_id (int): ID of the project.
    service (ConfigService): Service layer for handling logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[list]: List of LLM configurations.

Gives LLM configuration for a specific ID.

Args:
    llm_id (int): ID of the LLM Configuration.
    service (ConfigService): Service layer for handling logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: LLM configuration.

post.description:
Endpoint to save the embedding configuration.

This endpoint accepts a POST request with an embedding configuration object
and saves it using the `EmbeddingServices` service. The configuration data
is processed and stored, with a success response returned upon completion.

Args:
request (EmbeddingConfig): The embedding configuration data to be saved.
service (EmbeddingServices, optional): The embedding service used to
handle the saving logic. It is injected via dependency injection.

Returns:
BaseResponse[dict]: A response object containing the status, message,
and the resulting data after saving the embedding configuration.
The message will indicate the success of the operation.

Raises:
HTTPException: If there is an error during the embedding configuration
save process, an HTTP error is raised with an appropriate message.

delete.description:
Delete an existing Embedding configuration.

Args:
    config_id (int): The unique identifier of the embedding configuration to be deleted.
    service (ConfigService): Service layer for handling logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: Success message and deletion result.

put.description:
Updates the embedding configuration for a given config ID.

This endpoint allows for the modification of the embedding configuration
based on the provided `config_id`. The request body should contain the
updated embedding configuration details. The service will process the update
and return the result of the operation.

Args:
    request (EmbeddingConfig): The updated embedding configuration details.
    config_id (int): The unique ID of the embedding configuration to update.
    service (EmbeddingServices, optional): The service responsible for updating
                                            the embedding configuration.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: A response object containing a success status,
                         a success message, and the result of the update operation.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the update fails, an HTTP error will be raised with
                   an appropriate status and error message.

get.description:
Retrieves a list of embedding configurations for a specific project.

This endpoint fetches all embedding configurations associated with the provided
`project_id`. The service layer is used to query the database and return the list
of configurations, which is then included in the response.

Args:
    project_id (int): The unique ID of the project for which embedding configurations
                       are to be retrieved.
    service (EmbeddingServices, optional): The service responsible for retrieving
                                            the embedding configurations.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[list]: A response object containing a success status, a success message,
                         and the list of embedding configurations.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the service layer fails to retrieve the configurations, an
                   appropriate HTTP error will be raised.

post.description:
Save a new speech model configuration.

Args:
    request (SpeechConfigRequest): The configuration data to be saved.
    service (SpeechConfigService): Service dependency for speech configuration logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: Success message with the saved configuration data.

put.description:
Update an existing speech model configuration.

Args:
    config_id (int): The ID of the configuration to update.
    request (SpeechConfigRequest): The new configuration data.
    service (SpeechConfigService): Service dependency for speech configuration logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: Success message with the updated configuration data.

delete.description:
Delete a speech model configuration by its ID.

Args:
    config_id (int): The ID of the configuration to delete.
    service (SpeechConfigService): Service dependency for speech configuration logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[dict]: Success message indicating the deletion status.

get.description:
Retrieve a list of speech model configurations for a given project.

Args:
    project_id (int): The ID of the project to fetch configurations for.
    service (SpeechConfigService): Service dependency for speech configuration logic.

Returns:
    BaseResponse[list]: Success message with the list of configurations.

post.description:
API endpoint to install security-related packages based on the provided configuration.

This function delegates the installation logic to the ScriptConfigService.
It returns a BaseResponse indicating whether the operation succeeded or failed.

Args:
    request (PackageRequest): The request payload containing package installation details.
    service (ScriptConfigService): The service responsible for handling package installation.

Returns:
    dict: A serialized BaseResponse containing the status, message, and result data.

get.description:
Retrieve model consumption records with optional filters.
If no filters are applied, returns all records.

schema.description: Start date for custom filter (ISO format) yyyy-mm-dd

schema.title: Custom End

parameters.description: End date for custom filter (ISO format) yyyy-mm-dd

schema.description: Filter by LLM type (must be 1, 2, or 3)

capability.title: Capability
capability.description: Name of the capability supported by model(e.g., summarization, translation).

score.title: Score
score.description: Confidence score or performance rating of the capability.

Capability.title: Capability
Capability.description:
Represents a capability with an associated score.

Attributes:
    capability (Optional[str]): The name or description of the capability. Defaults to None.
    score (Optional[float]): The score or rating of the capability. Defaults to None.

CapabilityItem.title: CapabilityItem
CapabilityItem.description:
Represents a single capability item with its associated score.

Attributes:
    capability (str): Name or type of the capability (e.g., summarization, translation).
    score (float): Score or weight associated with the capability.

created.title: Created
created.description: Timestamp of when the response was created.

model.title: Model
model.description: The name of the model used.

choices.title: Choices
choices.description: List of choices with messages and metadata.

ChatCompletionResponse.title: ChatCompletionResponse
ChatCompletionResponse.description:
Represents the response returned from a chat completion request.

Attributes:
    id (str): Unique identifier for the response.
    object (str): Type of the returned object (e.g., 'chat.completion').
    created (int): Unix timestamp indicating when the response was created.
    model (str): Identifier for the model used to generate the completion.
    system_fingerprint (Optional[str]): Fingerprint for tracing
                        system configuration (if available).
    choices (List[Choice]): List of response choices including messages and related metadata.
    usage (Usage): Details about token usage for the prompt and completion.

message.description: The message object containing role and content.

finish_reason.title: Finish Reason
finish_reason.description: The reason for finishing the response.

Choice.title: Choice
Choice.description:
Represents one of the possible choices returned by a language model response.

Attributes:
    index (int): The index of the choice in the list of returned completions.
    message (Message): The generated message including role and content.
    logprobs (Optional[str]): Log probabilities of tokens, if available.
    finish_reason (Optional[str]): Reason why the model stopped generating this completion.

DeleteEmbeddingConfig.title: DeleteEmbeddingConfig
DeleteEmbeddingConfig.description:
Represents the request structure for deleting an embedding configuration.

Attributes:
    id (int): The unique identifier for the embedding configuration to be deleted.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier of the LLM configuration to be deleted.

DeleteLLMConfig.title: DeleteLLMConfig
DeleteLLMConfig.description: Request model for deleting an existing LLM configuration.

EMBConfigResponse.title: EMBConfigResponse
EMBConfigResponse.description:
Response schema for an Embedding Model configuration.

Attributes:
    id (int): Unique identifier of the configuration.
    platform (str): Platform name where the embedding model is hosted.
    model_provider (Optional[str]): The embedding model provider.
    config_json (Dict[str, str]): Dictionary containing configuration data.
    is_active (Optional[bool]): Status of the configuration.
    created_by (Optional[int]): ID of the user who created this config.
    lm_type (int): Type identifier for the embedding model.
    created_at (Optional[datetime]): Timestamp when the configuration was created.
    dimension (Optional[int]): Vector dimension size used in the embedding model.
    similarity_score (Optional[int]): Similarity threshold or score used for retrieval.
    name (Optional[str]): Name of the configuration.
    is_default (Optional[bool]): Whether this configuration is marked as default.
    project_id (int): Project ID this configuration is associated with.

EmbeddingConfig.title: EmbeddingConfig
EmbeddingConfig.description:
EmbeddingConfig
This class represents the configuration schema for various embedding platforms.
It validates the required fields based on the selected platform and ensures that all necessary
information is provided for proper integration.

Attributes:
    platform (Literal):
        The platform for which the configuration is defined.
    Supported platforms include:
        - "NVIDIA Enterprise"
        - "Azure Open AI"
        - "Google Vertex AI"
        - "Amazon Titan"
        - "IBM Watsonx"
        - "Hugging Face Inferencing"
        - "Intel"
        - "Self Hosted"
    config_name (str): The name of the configuration.
    description (str): A description of the configuration.
    model_provider (Optional[str]):
        The provider of the model (used for "Self Hosted" platform).
    model_name (Optional[str]): The name of the model.
    end_point (Optional[str]): The endpoint URL for the platform.
    api_key (Optional[str]): The API key for authentication.
    deployment_name (Optional[str]): The deployment name (specific to Azure Open AI).
    api_version (Optional[str]): The API version (specific to Azure Open AI).
    api_type (Optional[str]): The API type (specific to Azure Open AI).
    region (Optional[str]): The region for the platform (e.g., AWS, Azure).
    access_key (Optional[str]): The access key for authentication (e.g., AWS).
    secret_key (Optional[str]): The secret key for authentication (e.g., AWS).
    model_id (Optional[str]): The model ID (e.g., Amazon Titan, IBM Watsonx).
    watsonx_project_id (Optional[str]): The project ID for IBM Watsonx.
    script_name (Optional[str]):
        The name of the script (specific to "Script Based" provider).
    packages (Optional[List[str]]):
        The list of required packages (specific to "Script Based" provider).
    script (Optional[str]):
        The script content (specific to "Script Based" provider).
    dimension (int): The dimensionality of the embeddings.
    similarity_score (Optional[str]): The type of similarity score to use.
    is_default (bool): Flag indicating if this is the default configuration.
    capabilities (Optional[List[Capability]]): A list of capabilities associated with the model.
    lm_type (int): The type of language model (embedding_model = 2). Defaults to 2.

Methods:
    validate_platform_specific_fields():
        Raises:
            ValueError: If any required fields are missing or invalid for the selected platform.

EmbeddingData.title: EmbeddingData
EmbeddingData.description:
EmbeddingData is a Pydantic model that represents the structure of embedding data.

Attributes:
    embedding (List[float]):
        The embedding vector, represented as a list of floating-point numbers.
    index (int): The index of the embedding, typically used to identify its position.
    object (str): The type of the object, such as 'embedding'.

model.title: Model
model.description: The name of the embedding model.

data.title: Data
data.description: A list of embedding data objects.

EmbeddingModelResponse.title: EmbeddingModelResponse
EmbeddingModelResponse.description:
EmbeddingResponse is a Pydantic model that represents the response structure
    for embedding-related operations.

Attributes:
    model (str): The name of the embedding model.
    data (List[EmbeddingData]): A list of embedding data objects.
    object (str): The type of the object (e.g., 'list').
    usage (UsageDetails): Details about token usage.

input.title: Input
input.description: provide list of string to create embedding

EmbeddingRequest.title: EmbeddingRequest
EmbeddingRequest.description:
Request model for generating embeddings from input data.

Attributes:
    model (Optional[str]): Name of the embedding model to use.
    input (str | List[str] | List[List[int]]): The input data to be embedded.
    user (Optional[EmbeddingUserParams]): Optional user and project parameters.

EmbeddingResponse.title: EmbeddingResponse
EmbeddingResponse.description:
EmbeddingResponse is a Pydantic model that represents the response structure
for embedding-related operations.

This model is used to encapsulate the response data returned by the embedding
configuration APIs. It ensures that the response adheres to a consistent structure
and provides a unique identifier for the embedding configuration.

Attributes:
    id (int):
        The unique identifier for the embedding configuration. This ID is used to
        reference the specific embedding configuration that was created, updated,
        or retrieved during the operation.

EmbeddingUserParams.title: EmbeddingUserParams
EmbeddingUserParams.description:
Parameters related to user and project configuration for embedding.

Attributes:
    config_id (Optional[StrictInt]): Unique identifier for the configuration.
    project_id (Optional[StrictInt]): Unique identifier for the project.

HealthCheck.title: HealthCheck
HealthCheck.description: Response model to validate and return when performing a health check.

prompt_id.title: Prompt Id
prompt_id.description: ID of the prompt to be executed.

data.title: Data
data.description:
Optional data to be used with the prompt.
            In case of additional prompt data,
            pass the value in `__global_var_prompt_data__` key.

config_id.title: Config Id
config_id.description: ID of the model configuration to be used.

LLMCallRequest.title: LLMCallRequest
LLMCallRequest.description:
LLMCallRequest defines the schema for a request to execute a prompt
using a Large Language Model (LLM).

Attributes:
    prompt_id (StrictInt): ID of the prompt to be executed. Must be between 1 and 2,147,483,647.
    data (Optional[dict]): Optional data to be used with the prompt.
        For additional prompt data, use the `__global_var_prompt_data__` key.
            Example: {"key": "value"}.
    config_id (Optional[StrictInt]): ID of the model configuration to be used.
        Must be between 1 and 2,147,483,647.
    llm_guard_enabled (Optional[bool]): Flag to enable or disable LLM guard checks.
        Defaults to False.

end_point.description: Endpoint URL for accessing the LLM service.

secret_key.title: Secret Key

script.title: Script
script.description: Python script code used for custom model behavior.

LLMConfig.title: LLMConfig
LLMConfig.description:
LLMConfig
This class represents the configuration schema for various Large Language Model (LLM) platforms.
It validates the required fields based on the selected platform and ensures that all necessary
information is provided for proper integration.
Attributes:
    platform (Literal): The platform for which the configuration is defined.
    Supported platforms include:
        - "Azure Open AI"
        - "NVIDIA Enterprise"
        - "Google Vertex AI"
        - "AWS Sagemaker AI"
        - "AWS Bedrock"
        - "IBM Watsonx"
        - "Hugging Face Inferencing"
        - "Intel"
        - "Self Hosted"
    config_name (str): The name of the configuration.
    model_provider (Optional[str]): The provider of the model (used for "Self Hosted" platform).
    model_name (Optional[str]): The name of the model.
    end_point (Optional[str]): The endpoint URL for the platform.
    api_key (Optional[str]): The API key for authentication.
    deployment_name (Optional[str]): The deployment name (specific to Azure Open AI).
    api_version (Optional[str]): The API version (specific to Azure Open AI).
    api_type (Optional[str]): The API type (specific to Azure Open AI).
    region (Optional[str]): The region for the platform (e.g., AWS, Azure).
    access_key (Optional[str]): The access key for authentication (e.g., AWS).
    secret_key (Optional[str]): The secret key for authentication (e.g., AWS).
    model_id (Optional[str]): The model ID (e.g., IBM Watsonx, AWS Bedrock).
    watsonx_project_id (Optional[str]): The project ID for IBM Watsonx.
    oauth_endpoint (Optional[str]): The OAuth endpoint (specific to "EntraId Secured" provider).
    client_id (Optional[str]): The client ID for OAuth authentication.
    client_secret (Optional[str]): The client secret for OAuth authentication.
    app_key (Optional[str]): The application key (specific to "EntraId Secured" provider).
    script_name (Optional[str]): The name of the script (specific to "Script Based" provider).
    packages (Optional[List[str]]):
        The list of required packages (specific to "Script Based" provider).
    script (Optional[str]): The script content (specific to "Script Based" provider).
    temperature (float): The temperature parameter for the model.
    input_token (int): The maximum number of input tokens.
    output_token (int): The maximum number of output tokens.
Methods:
    validate_platform_specific_fields():
        Raises:
            ValueError: If any required fields are missing or invalid for the selected platform.

tool_call_id.title: Tool Call Id
tool_call_id.description: Unique identifier for the tool call, if applicable.

Message.title: Message
Message.description:
Represents a message exchanged in a chat, including role, content, and optional tool/function
call metadata.

Attributes:
    role (str): The role of the LLM (e.g., 'assistant').
    content (str | None): The actual content of the message.
    tool_calls (Optional[list]): A list of tool call data, if any.
    function_call (Optional[dict]): Details of any function call made within the message.
    tool_call_id (Optional[str]): Identifier for the tool call, used to correlate tool usage.

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Comma-separated package names to be installed.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: Platform or provider of the speech model (e.g., Azure, Google).

model_name.title: Model Name
model_name.description: Name of the speech model to be used.

end_point.title: End Point
end_point.description: API endpoint for the speech model.

api_key.title: Api Key
api_key.description: API key for authenticating requests to the speech model.

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Indicates whether this configuration is active.

is_default.title: Is Default
is_default.description: Indicates whether this is the default speech configuration.

SpeechConfigRequest.title: SpeechConfigRequest
SpeechConfigRequest.description: Request model for creating or updating a speech configuration.

prompt_tokens.title: Prompt Tokens
prompt_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the prompt.

completion_tokens.title: Completion Tokens
completion_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the completion.

Usage.title: Usage
Usage.description:
Represents token usage statistics for a chat completion response.

Attributes:
    prompt_tokens (int): Number of tokens used in the input prompt.
    completion_tokens (int): Number of tokens generated in the response.
    total_tokens (int): Total number of tokens used (prompt + completion).
    total_cost (Optional[float]): Estimated cost of the API call, if applicable.

completion_tokens.title: Completion Tokens
completion_tokens.description: The number of completion tokens used.

prompt_tokens.title: Prompt Tokens
prompt_tokens.description: The number of prompt tokens used.

total_tokens.title: Total Tokens
total_tokens.description: The total number of tokens used.

total_cost.title: Total Cost
total_cost.description: The total cost incurred for the request.

UsageDetails.title: UsageDetails
UsageDetails.description:
UsageDetails is a Pydantic model that represents the details of token usage
    and associated costs.

Attributes:
    completion_tokens (int): The number of completion tokens used.
    prompt_tokens (int): The number of prompt tokens used.
    total_tokens (int): The total number of tokens used.
    total_cost (Optional[float]): The total cost incurred for the request. Defaults to None.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the LLM configuration.

app__schema__llm_config_schema__LLMConfi.title: LLMConfigResponse
app__schema__llm_config_schema__LLMConfi.description: Response model for returning basic LLM configuration information.

app__schema__response_schema__LLMConfigR.title: LLMConfigResponse
app__schema__response_schema__LLMConfigR.description:
Response schema for a Language Model (LLM) configuration.

Attributes:
    id (int): Unique identifier of the configuration.
    platform (str): Platform name where the LLM is hosted (e.g., Azure, AWS).
    model_provider (Optional[str]): The model provider name (e.g., OpenAI, Hugging Face).
    description (Optional[str]): Human-readable description of the configuration.
    config_json (Dict[str, str]): Dictionary of config details (endpoint, keys, etc.).
    is_active (Optional[bool]): Flag indicating if the configuration is active.
    created_by (Optional[int]): User ID who created the configuration.
    lm_type (int): Language model type identifier.
    created_at (Optional[datetime]): Timestamp when the configuration was created.
    input_token_count (Optional[int]): Number of tokens supported for input.
    output_token_count (Optional[int]): Number of tokens supported for output.
    temperature (Optional[float]): Sampling temperature for the LLM.
    name (Optional[str]): Name of the configuration.
    is_default (Optional[bool]): Indicates if this is the default configuration.
    project_id (int): Project ID this configuration is associated with.
    capabilities (Optional[List[CapabilityItem]]): List of model capabilities with scores.

app__schema__response_schema__SpeechConf.title: SpeechConfigResponse
app__schema__response_schema__SpeechConf.description:
Response schema for a Speech Model configuration.

Attributes:
    id (int): Unique identifier for the configuration.
    platform (str): Platform where the speech model is hosted.
    model_provider (Optional[str]): Name of the model provider.
    config_json (Dict[str, str]): Dictionary of config values such as API key, endpoint.
    created_by (Optional[int]): ID of the user who created this configuration.
    lm_type (int): Language model type identifier for speech.
    created_at (Optional[datetime]): Creation timestamp of the configuration.
    name (Optional[str]): Configuration name.
    is_default (Optional[bool]): Flag indicating if this is the default configuration.
    project_id (int): ID of the project this config belongs to.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier of the speech configuration.

app__schema__speech_config_schema__Speec.title: SpeechConfigResponse
app__schema__speech_config_schema__Speec.description: Response model containing the ID of a speech configuration.
